from __future__ import annotations

import unittest


class TestUsers(unittest.TestCase):
    def setUp(self) -> None:
        self.base_url = "https://service.local"


class TestOrders(unittest.TestCase):
    def setUp(self) -> None:
        self.base_url = "https://service.local"


def unittest_test_class_duplicates_setup_without_base_class_positive() -> int:
    return len(TestUsers.__mro__) + len(TestOrders.__mro__)
